reviews.review_msg: Lots of quizzes. They were difficult, but if you write down and memorize exactly what he says during lecture you should do well. Sometimes his lectures were a bit disorganized + he would contradict himself. Overall good and interesting course. No participation in this course - lecture only. 1 paper, 1 in class essay, 4 quizzes, in class final.
His lecture notes are so messy and require you to write your own notes. he does not post any notes online.
Excellent prof. Very helpful and friendly. Fun class with very interesting material. Quizzes are not easy but they are okay. Fun assignments and papers. Highly recommended.

Going to lecture is a must as he doesn't record himself & his notes are minimal... Quizzes are not too hard if you study; however, he likes to ask really obscure questions, and his questions are not very specific. The course topics are all over the place and extremely uninteresting towards the end.

Super nice guy but WEIRD. Topics all over the map. "Term paper" written IN CLASS. Wastes whole lecture on essay basics (This isn't ENG 100!). Docked points for not starting thesis statement with "In this essay" (seriously!) Tests focus on a lot of pointless obscurities. Vague questions, but docks points if you don't list details he's looking for

He's a great teacher and he teaches well. His quizzes are difficult and he marks on the hard side though. Going to class is a good idea since he doesn't do recorded lectures or online notes. If you take his classes, please remember to keep up with the lectures and readings.
A great prof. If you don't do well in his class it's your own fault.

Very nice guy.  He helps his students whenever they need him.  Course itself is very interesting.  Markings are fair.  Quizzes and assignments are all fine. Highly recommended to take Brian's courses whenever they are available!

Are you kidding me? This guy's quizzes were so easy; didn't have to study too much and he is very fair when marking your paper. Super friendly guy and is always willing to help -- doesn't reply to emails though so if you ahve a question, ask him after class
His quizzes were difficult, as were the presentation and the term paper. He has high expectations for a 200-level course. You really need to put in the time. Nice guy though.

Dr. Pendleton is a nice guy.  He helps his students every step of the way.  His quizzes are somewhat challenging (esp. the matching), but as long as you keep up with the reading and study his lecture notes, then you will do fine. Attendance is extremely important as his quizzes and tests are all based on what he says. Great class and professor!
Gosh, this class is just terrible. I don't recommend this class by THIS professor, especially if you're in your third or fourth year, it will just annoy you.

Oh my goodness i can't wait for this class to finish. As interesting as the topic is, this guy drives me nuts. Friendly, grampa-like professor with a bit of a stutter, but babies the class, has odd expectations and his bi-weekly exams matching questions are challenging. if you put the time in to study you should be fine...but it does require time
